tasks.subject: Task 0: Foundation — tokens, font, booth surfaces
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Land design tokens (Saira Condensed, 5-step scale, --beam/--cue-hot), reskin board surfaces to opaque booth-dark + grain/vignette; no structural/JS change.

**Files:** public/index.html, public/css/01-base.css, public/css/03-game.css

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/index.html","public/css/01-base.css","public/css/03-game.css"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- --runInBand","acceptanceCriteria":["Saira loads + --font-display resolves","--beam/--beam-glow/--cue-hot + 5 --t* resolve","feed-container frost removed, opaque charcoal","grain+vignette ≤6%","npm test baseline unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: The Beam — gate, sprockets, splice seam, billing
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Evolve filmstrip/reel/reel-node/reel-bridge/now-cast into film through a gate: sprocket perfs, enlarged sharp gate frame, connecting actor on splice seam, cast as billing block. Keep burned/ghost states.

**Files:** public/css/03-game.css

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/css/03-game.css"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- --runInBand","acceptanceCriteria":["reel = sprocketed filmstrip, keeps overflow behavior","now-playing = sharp gate frame w/ indigo border+glow","reel-bridge = splice credit (display caps)","now-cast = billing block","survives 26-char title + 9-name cast","burned/ghost/broken evolved not removed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: The Bench — operator frames + Up Next (TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Restyle roster as film-frame operators + box-office status; add Up Next via exported pure nextAliveIndex.

**Files:** public/js/ui/ui-render.js, public/css/03-game.css, client-tests/booth-bench.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/js/ui/ui-render.js","public/css/03-game.css","client-tests/booth-bench.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"npx jest client-tests/booth-bench.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["nextAliveIndex skips eliminated + wraps + -1 alone (TDD)","active=On Screen, up-next=Up Next, eliminated=Walked Out","team/solo branches still render","rows = film-frame chips"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Splice console + cue dot + suggestions float
tasks.description:
**Goal:** #input-area as splice console (Roll It); timer as cue dot via existing timerSeverity; desktop suggestions float (reuse #mobile-ac-dropdown).

**Files:** public/index.html, public/js/socketClient.js, public/js/ui/ui-autocomplete.js, public/css/03-game.css

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/index.html","public/js/socketClient.js","public/js/ui/ui-autocomplete.js","public/css/03-game.css"],"verifyCommand":"npx jest client-tests/submission-pill.test.js client-tests/socket-handlers.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["console + Roll It (id+aria+SVG kept)","cue-dot reflects severity, amber pulse at critical/panic","#timer-bar + #time-text preserved","desktop suggestions float","out-of-turn disabled preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Chat lobby drawer + ticket-stub reactions (TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Chat in collapsible lobby drawer (bench toggle + unread); ticket-stub reactions, fix innerText payload via data-reaction.

**Files:** public/index.html, public/js/app.js, public/css/03-game.css, client-tests/booth-reactions.test.js, client-tests/booth-chat-drawer.test.js

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/index.html","public/js/app.js","public/css/03-game.css","client-tests/booth-reactions.test.js","client-tests/booth-chat-drawer.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"npx jest client-tests/booth-reactions.test.js client-tests/booth-chat-drawer.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["reactionPayload uses data-reaction, falls back to text (TDD)","ChatDrawerState unread closed-only, resets on open (TDD)","chat drawer + toggle + unread, #chat-* preserved","reactions = ticket stubs, aria kept"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Motion system + reduced-motion
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Named-curve motion + booth beats (accepted splice, handoff travel, failed recoil, cue burn, win) + first-class reduced-motion.

**Files:** public/css/06-states-anim.css, public/css/03-game.css

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/css/06-states-anim.css","public/css/03-game.css"],"verifyCommand":"npx jest client-tests/turn-motion.test.js client-tests/timer-panic.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["curves tokenized, durations 120/200/320","accepted/handoff/failed/cue beats","reuses choreographTurn/clutch","reduced-motion extends existing block, preserves info+cue color"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Responsive stack + 10-case validation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Booth stacks on mobile, tabs relabeled (data-tab kept), seam horizontal fallback; validate hostile-content matrix + coverage gate.

**Files:** public/css/05-responsive.css, public/index.html

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/css/05-responsive.css","public/index.html"],"verifyCommand":"npm test -- --runInBand --coverage","acceptanceCriteria":["mobile stack via .mobile-tabs, data-tab unchanged","seam horizontal ≤767px","10-case matrix passes","public/js coverage ≥ floors"]}
```
